hero.name: Maurice
hero.tagline: Frontend Engineer focused on Vue.js/TS architectures and clean UI/UX. Strong foundation in Backend (Node.js/Python) and Cloud DevOps (AWS, Terraform, CI/CD).
hero.subtitle: [ IDENTITY_PROTOCOL_LOADED ]

skills.bio:
Frontend Engineer with deep architectural understanding (MVVM) and a clear specialization in complex, high-performance frontend applications (Vue.js, TypeScript).

My core competency lies at the intersection of thoughtful UI/UX design and robust state management logic. What sets me apart is my holistic T-shaped approach: I don't just build frontends — I seamlessly integrate them with backend services (Node.js, Python).

Through solid DevOps and cloud practice (Docker Compose, GitHub Actions, AWS, Terraform), I build, test, and deploy applications independently across the entire software lifecycle.
